summary: Tested all 3 new features: Admin Coach Verification Panel, Live Social Proof Counters, and Google SSO for Coaches. All 14 backend tests passed. All UI flows verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully verified: (1) /admin/coach-verification page loads with stats bar (Total Pending=0, Approved This Week=1), Pending Queue tab (empty), Verified Coaches tab shows testcoach@courtbound.edu. Admin header has 'Coach Verification' button (data-testid=admin-coach-verification-btn). (2) Coach Landing /coach shows live stats VERIFIED COACHES=1, US PROGRAMMES=1 from /api/coach/public/stats. Player Landing / shows live-coach-counter element with '1+'. (3) Coach Login /coach/login has 'Continue with Google' button (data-testid=coach-google-login-btn) with 'or' separator. Coach Register /coach/register has coach-google-register-btn on step 1. POST /api/coach/auth/google works: 404+needs_registration for unknown email, 200+token for testcoach@courtbound.edu. 2FA nudge banner shows on dashboard for email/password coaches, dismiss works.
